title: nephrodium filix-mas
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas, also known as male fern, is a perennial plant species belonging to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). Traditionally, the rhizomes and roots of Nephrodium filix-mas have been used in herbal medicine to treat parasitic worm infestations, such as tapeworms and roundworms, due to their anthelmintic properties. The plant's medicinal properties and health benefits have been associated with its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Nephrodium filix-mas can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, infusions, and powdered extracts, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
